summary: Fitness/workout logging app with per-workout lb/kg unit toggle and navigation link management.

existing_features.title: Remove the 4th anchor link element from the navigation bar in the Layout component. The element is identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/nav[1]/div[1]/div[1]/a[4]. Keep all other navigation links intact.

new_feature_requests.summary: lb/kg unit toggle should be adjustable per workout in the workout log, not a global setting
Delete the second (duplicate/unwanted) navigation link, keeping only the first
